scripts.test:e2e: npm run db:test:setup && npm run db:test:setup:redis && npm run db:test:wait && npm run db:test:migrate && jest --testPathPatterns=e2e --detectOpenHandles && npm run db:test:teardown && npm run db:test:teardown:redis
scripts.db:test:setup: docker rm -f test-mysql || true && docker run -d --name test-mysql -e MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=root -e MYSQL_DATABASE=delivery_db_test -p 3307:3306 mysql:latest
scripts.db:test:teardown: docker stop test-mysql && docker rm test-mysql
scripts.db:test:wait: until docker exec test-mysql mysql -hlocalhost -uroot -proot -e 'SELECT 1' >/dev/null 2>&1; do echo '⏳ Esperando MySQL...'; sleep 1; done
scripts.db:test:setup:redis: docker rm -f test-redis || true && docker run -d --name test-redis -p 6380:6379 redis:latest
scripts.db:test:teardown:redis: docker stop test-redis && docker rm test-redis
